{{Infobox character
| name = Lokk
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]]
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lokk]] is a disciple of the [[First Fisher]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lokk]] is a [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lokk]] is a member of the [[Fishers]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lokk]] uses a pair of [[steel]] [[Fisher's]] hooks in battle.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|“I happen to have a disciple. He's Highgold himself, like you are, and he's more than happy to stand for a traditional duel. Aren't you, Lokk?”<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
